name: Special Fried Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill deep-fat fryer with peanut oil and heat to 375°F (190°C).
2. Carefully lower the raw shelled peanuts into the hot oil using a frying basket.
3. Fry until the white peanuts turn brown, about 2-3 minutes.
4. Remove the basket from the oil and allow the peanuts to drip on paper towels for a few seconds.
5. Transfer the hot peanuts to a serving dish and sprinkle with salt while still warm.
6. Allow the peanuts to cool completely before placing them in an airtight container to keep fresh.
